title: DrTeleport
description: Best free all-in-one teleportation plugin for Minecraft servers featuring TPA requests, personal homes, RTP (random teleport), and server warps
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61da5feaa2f03e91f8263f8ce2fc9937e4d6e620.jpeg)![img1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b07449130925921275cc9b5fcf0627b575e7f39.jpeg)![img2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26f5bc16bffb14b77bff36fc471756b06092bd49.webp)![img3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14dfd75ad458bd587b2d0ae05247758860055bba.webp)

<details>
<summary>Text Desc</summary>

## Commands

* **/homes** – Open Homes GUI
* **/adminhome** – Open Admin Homes GUI
* **/home `<name>`** – Teleport to a home
* **/delhome `<name>`** – Delete a home
* **/warp `[name]`** – Open Warps GUI or teleport
* **/setwarp `<name>`** – Create a warp
* **/tpa `<player>`** – Send teleport request
* **/tpyes** – Accept request
* **/tpdeny** – Deny request
* **/tpacancel** – Cancel outgoing request
* **/tpatoggle** – Toggle teleport requests
* **/back** – Go back to last location
* **/rtp** – Random teleport
* **/import** – Import from EssentialsX
* **/drteleport** or **/dt** – Main admin command
* **/reload** – Reload configs

---

## Permissions

### General

```
drteleport.*        – All permissions
drteleport.admin    – Admin access
drteleport.reload   – Reload configs
```

### Homes

```
drteleport.homes.use
drteleport.homes.create
drteleport.homes.create.<count>
drteleport.homes.admin
drteleport.homes.bypasscooldown
drteleport.homes.*
```

### Warps

```
drteleport.warps.use
drteleport.warps.create
drteleport.warps.create.multiple.<count>
drteleport.warps.admin
drteleport.warps.*
```

### TPA

```
drteleport.tpa
```

### RTP

```
drteleport.rtp
drteleport.rtp.bypasscooldown
drteleport.rtp.bypassdelay
drteleport.rtp.world.*
```

### Back

```
drteleport.back.*
```

---

## Fully Customizable GUI System

DrTeleport includes a powerful and fully editable GUI system.

**Location:**
`plugins/DrTeleport/gui/`

**GUI files:**

* `homes.yml`
* `warps.yml`
* `tpa.yml`

### You can customize

* Item icons
* Names and lore
* Click actions
* Sounds
* Pagination
* Confirmation GUIs
* Locked items and password-protected warps

### Example (Homes GUI snippet)

```yml
main:
  title: "&8Homes Menu"

icons:
  set-icon:
    material: "LIGHT_BLUE_BED"
    name: "&#10ACFBHome %number%"
    lore:
      - "&#10ACFB| &fClick to teleport"
    glow: false
```

---

## Sounds & Messages

* **messages.yml** – Fully editable messages with placeholders
* **sounds.yml** – Custom sounds for:

  * GUI open
  * Clicks
  * Success and error
  * Teleport countdowns
  * TPA request alerts

---

## Installation

1. Drop **DrTeleport.jar** into your `/plugins` folder
2. Restart the server
3. Edit configs (`config.yml`, `messages.yml`, `sounds.yml`, `gui/*.yml`)
4. Reload with **/drteleport reload**
5. Assign permissions using LuckPerms

---

## EssentialsX Importer

Easily migrate Homes and Warps from EssentialsX:

```
/import
```

---

## Why Choose DrTeleport?

* No chat spam
* Smooth GUI navigation
* Lightweight and optimized
* Network and SMP ready
* Actively developed
* Built with modern API (1.21)

---

## Support & Updates

* Bugs and suggestions welcome
* Regular updates planned
* Optimized for high-player servers
* Full LuckPerms support

---

## Perfect For

* Survival servers
* Towny servers
* SMP networks
* Public and private servers

---

## Server Compatibility

**Minecraft Versions:**
1.20.2 – 1.21.x

**Tested On:**
Paper, Purpur

</details>
